Yonwabela ukhuseleko olupheleleyo, imiyalezo eyenyamalalayo, kunye nokufowuna ngezwi/ividiyo nge-HD — kunye nezixhobo ezakhelweyo ezikunceda uhlale unxibelelene nangaphaya kwemida.

premiumMonthly.desc: Amava epheleleyo eChatforia: Izixhobo ezinamandla ze-AI, ukwenza ngokwezifiso, kunye nenkxaso ephambili.

features.ai: Izixhobo ezinamandla ze-AI ezikhethekileyo ze-Premium zokubhala ngokutsha, iimpendulo ezikrelekrele, kunye nezishwankathelo
features.support: Inkxaso ephambili xa ufuna uncedo kakhulu

premiumAnnual.title: i-Premium (yoNyaka)
premiumAnnual.desc: Yonga ngakumbi xa uhlawuliswa ngonyaka — kuquka iithimu zemibala ezongezelelweyo, izixhobo ze-AI, kunye nenkxaso ephambili.

features.allPremium: Yonke into ekwi-Premium yeNyanga — kuquka imixholo yemibala eyongezelelweyo
features.save25: Yonga malunga ne-30% xa uthelekisa nokuhlawula nyanga nenyanga
features.bestFor: Ilungele kakhulu abasebenzisi abaziingcali, abasebenzi abakude, kunye nabahambi rhoqo

premiumAnnual.disclaimer: Uhlawuliswa kwangaphambili. Rhoxisa nanini na. Akukho ntlawulo zifihliweyo.

marketing.premiumMonthlyDesc: Iimpawu ezipheleleyo, iiringi-ntoni, kunye nezixhobo ezinamandla ze-AI.
marketing.premiumAnnualDesc: Wonga ngakumbi xa uhlawulelwa nyaka wonke.
marketing.annualDisclaimer: Uhlawuliswa kwangaphambili. Rhoxisa nanini na. Akukho ntlawulo zifihliweyo.

mobile.title: Chatforia Mobile (iipakethe zedatha ze-eSIM)
mobile.subtitle: Yongeza idatha yehlabathi jikelele ukuze i-Chatforia iqhubeke isebenza nokuba awunayo i-Wi-Fi. Amaxabiso alungelelaniswa ngokuzenzekelayo ngokusekelwe kwilizwe lakho nakwimali yakho.
mobile.subtitle.detail: Khetha ipakethe yedatha yehlabathi yexesha elinye ukuze iChatforia iqhubeke isebenza xa usahamba okanye ukude neWi-Fi.

features.throttle: Idatha enesantya esiphezulu exhomekeke kwimigaqo-nkqubo yokusetyenziswa ngokufanelekileyo nolawulo lwenethiwekhi

disclaimer.devices: Iipakethe zedatha ze-eSIM zifuna isixhobo esihambelana ne-eSIM nesivuliweyo. Ukufumaneka kwahluka ngokwemodeli yefowuni, umthwali, kunye nelizwe. Ukufikelela kunye nesantya ziyahluka ngokwengingqi.

compare.title: Thelekisa iipakethe zedatha ze-eSIM
compare.disclaimer: Ukusetyenziswa kwedatha kuyaxhomekeka kwindlela osebenzisa ngayo iChatforia (ilizwi, ividiyo, imidiya, nezinye ii-apps kwifowuni yakho).

family.title: Chatforia Family (idatha ekwabelwana ngayo)
family.subtitle: Yabelana ngedatha enye yosapho lonke. Ibhili enye, ii-akhawunti ezininzi zeChatforia, ukufikelela kwihlabathi jikelele.

small.title: Usapho Oluncinci
small.desc: Iquka i-20 GB yedatha ekwabelwana ngayo enesantya esiphezulu — ilungele abasebenzisi ababini ukuya kwabathathu abasebenzisa kancinci.

medium.title: Usapho Oluphakathi
medium.desc: Iquka i-40 GB yedatha ekwabelwana ngayo enesantya esiphezulu — ilungele amalungu asebenzayo ama-3–5.

large.title: Usapho Olukhulu
large.desc: Iquka i-80 GB yedatha ekwabelwana ngayo enesantya esiphezulu — yeeintsapho ezisebenzisa kakhulu i-intanethi.

feature.shared: Idama ledatha ekwabelwana ngayo lentsapho yakho
feature.topUp: Yongeza ezinye iipakethe nangaliphi na ixesha
feature.fairUse: Ixhomekeke kumgaqo-nkqubo wokusetyenziswa ngokufanelekileyo nakwimida yasekuhlaleni

family.disclaimer: Iipakethe zosapho zenza okanye zongeza kwidama ledatha ekwabelwana ngayo. Ungamenywa kwaye ukhuphe amalungu nanini na.
family.footnote: Iipakethe zosapho zabelana ngedama ledatha elinye kuzo zonke ii-akhawunti zeChatforia ezidibeneyo. Ukufumaneka nemida kuxhomekeke kwilizwe lakho nemimiselo yasekuhlaleni.

why.title: Isizathu sokuba abantu batshintshele kwiChatforia
why.subtitle: IChatforia ikunika inombolo yefowuni yokwenyani, uguqulelo olukrelekrele, kunye nendlela ecacileyo yokuphelisa iintengiso xa sele ukulungele.

textnow.title: Chatforia vs TextNow
textnow.body: Iintengiso ezingephi kwi-Free, uphuculo olulula lwe-Plus xa ukulungele, kunye nezixhobo ze-Premium ezingafumanekiyo kwi-TextNow.

voice.title: Chatforia vs Google Voice
voice.body: I-app yanamhlanje, yehlabathi jikelele -uyilo olusekelwe kubasebenzisi, kunye nenguqulelo eyakhelweyo endaweni yokudlulisela iifowuni kwabanye indlela endala.

iimessenger.umzimba: Thumela imiyalezo kumanani efowuni okwenyani — hayi kuphela kwabanye abasebenzisi be-app — nge-AI kunye nesimo esakhelweyo. Kukulungele kakhulu ukuba uvela kwii-app ezifana neTextFree okanye iTextMe.

why.disclaimer: Uthelekiso lusekelwe kulwazi olufumaneka esidlangalaleni kwaye lunokutshintsha ngokuhamba kwexesha. Ezinye ii-apps zokuthumela imiyalezo yasimahla ezifana neTextFree okanye iTextMe zifana kakhulu neTextNow.

free.a: Ewe. Isicwangciso sasimahla siquka inombolo yeChatforia, ukufowuna, kunye nokuthumela imiyalezo eneenqaku zentengiso. Ungahlala kwisicwangciso sasimahla ixesha elide kangangoko uthanda, okanye uphucule ukususa iinqaku zentengiso kwaye uvule ezinye iimpawu.

plusPremium.a: I-Plus isusa iintengiso kwaye yandise imbali yemiyalezo yakho — ilungele ukusetyenziswa kwemihla ngemihla. I-Premium yongeza ulungiso olongezelelweyo, izixhobo ze-AI zokubhala ngokutsha nokuphendula, kunye nenkxaso ephambili yabasebenzisi abaninzi.

esim.a: I-Chatforia Mobile isebenzisa ugcino-lwazi lwe-eSIM lwehlabathi jikelele. Ukufumaneka kwayo kuxhomekeke kwilizwe lakho nakwisixhobo sakho. Uza kubona iinketho ezixhaswayo ngexesha lokuqalisa ngaphakathi kwi-app.

cancel.q: Ndingakwazi na ukurhoxisa okanye ukutshintsha izicwangciso nangaliphi na ixesha?
cancel.a: Ewe. Ungalawula okanye urhoxise umrhumo wakho kwiphepha lokuhlawula kwi-app. Utshintsho luqala ukusebenza ekupheleni kwexesha lakho langoku lokuhlawula.

family.a: Ii-Family packs zenza idama yedatha ekwabelwana ngayo kwii-akhawunti ezininzi zeChatforia. Umntu omnye uhlawula ityala, kwaye ungamema okanye ususe amalungu kwaye umise imida kumntu ngamnye.

error.invite: Akunakwenzeka ukwenza isimemo. Qinisekisa ukuba nguwe umnini-sapho uze uzame kwakhona.
error.checkout: Asikwazanga ukuqalisa inkqubo yokuhlawula yesicwangciso soSapho. Nceda uzame kwakhona.

billing.freePlanCopy: Usekwisicwangciso sasimahla. Phucula ukuze uvule iimpawu ezininzi.
billing.uncedoLokurhaxaza: Ungakwazi ukulawula okanye urhaxaze isibhaliso sakho kumnyango wezibhaliso, okanye urhaxaze ngoko nangoku ngezantsi.
billing.qinisekisaUkurhaxaza: Uqinisekile ukuba ufuna ukurhaxaza isicwangciso sakho ngoko nangoku? Oku akunakubuyiswa emva.
billing.cancelNowError: Akunakwenzeka ukurhoxisa isicwangciso sakho ngoku. Nceda uzame kwakhona okanye usebenzise Lawula i-billing.

none.title: Akukho nosapho lusekwe okwangoku
none.body: Ukuze udale i-Chatforia Family kunye nedama yedatha ekwabelwana ngayo, qalisa isicwangciso se-Family.

data.heading: Ithala ledatha ekwabelwana ngalo
data.caption: Onke amalungu ayabelana ngeli thala. Siza kukwazisa xa usondela kumda wakho.

ukumema.body: Thumela i-imeyile okanye ikhonkco ukumema umntu kwi-pool yedatha yosapho enabelwana ngayo.
ukumema.expiryHint: Eli khonkco liphelelwa lixesha emva kweentsuku ezimbalwa. Ungasoloko udala elitsha.

join.title: Joyina usapho
join.body: Umenyiwe ukuba ujoyine iNtsapho yakwaChatforia kwaye wabelane ngepuli yabo yedatha.
join.success: Ujoyine olu sapho. Ngoku wabelana ngezibonelelo zabo zedatha.
join.error: Asikwazanga ukukongeza kolu sapho. Isimemo sisenokungasebenzi okanye siphelelwe lixesha.

randomChat.title: Incoko Engacwangciswanga
randomChat.isihlokwana: Dibana nomntu omtsha kwangoko, okanye ukhethe ukuncokola noRia.
randomChat.inkcazelo: Qala ngokuncokola ungaziwa. Yongeza umhlobo kamva ukuba uvakalelwa ngendlela efanelekileyo.
randomChat.setAge: Misa uluhlu lweminyaka yakho kwiProfayile → Iminyaka ukuze uhlangane nabantu abafanelekileyo.
randomChat.hiddenUsernames: Amagama abasebenzisi ahlala efihliwe de bobabini bakhethe u-Add Friend.
randomChat.riaSeparate: Thetha noRia nangaliphi na ixesha — ngokwahlukileyo ekudibaniseni abantu abangazenzekelanga.
randomChat.ageDisclaimer: Sigcina kuphela uluhlu lweminyaka yakho (hayi umhla wakho wokuzalwa kanye). Oku kusetyenziselwa ukugcina ukudityaniswa kwi-Random Chat kunengqiqo. Ukuze udityaniswe nabantu (kungekuko i-RiaBot kuphela), seta uluhlu lweminyaka yakho kwi-Settings → Iminyaka ne-Random Chat.
randomChat.ageBandRequired: Misa uluhlu lweminyaka yakho kwiProfayile → Iminyaka & Incoko eNgacwangciswanga ukuze uhlangane nabantu.
randomChat.ageBandCallout: Ukuze uhlangane nabantu (hayi iRiaBot kuphela), misa uluhlu lweminyaka yakho kwiZicwangciso → Iminyaka & Incoko eNgacwangciswanga.

greetings.long5: Hey {{name}} 🙂 Ufuna ukukhupha umoya, ubuze, okanye sencebe nje?

greetings.short6: Owu hey {{name}}! Unekhaya intsha engqondweni yakho?

login.title: Qhubeka uye kwiChatforia
login.ssoUnavailable: I-Single-sign-on ayifumaneki okwangoku. Sebenzisa igama lomsebenzisi kunye negama lokugqitha endaweni yoko.

verification.sent: I-imeyile yokuqinisekisa ithunyelwe. Jonga i-inbox yakho.

error.unprocessable: Isicelo asivumelekanga. Jonga igama lakho lomsebenzisi/i-imeyile kunye negama lokugqitha.
error.deviceLimit: Umda wezixhobo ufikelelwe kwisicwangciso sasimahla. Phuma kwisixhobo esinye okanye uphuculele kwi-Premium ukuze udibanise izixhobo ezininzi.

forgotPassword.uncedo: Faka i-imeyile oyisebenzisileyo ukwenza i-akhawunti yakho ye-Chatforia kwaye siza kukuthumelela ikhonkco elikhuselekileyo lokuseta kwakhona i-password yakho.
forgotPassword.genericError: Akunakwenzeka ukulungisa isicelo. Nceda uzame kwakhona emva komzuzwana.
forgotPassword.sentHelper: Ukuba ikhona i-akhawunti enalo elo dilesi ye-imeyile, sithumele ikhonkco lokuseta kwakhona iphasiwedi. Ingathatha imizuzu embalwa ukufika. Qiniseka ukuba ujonga ifolda yakho ye-spam okanye ye-promotions.

resetPassword.title: Seta kwakhona i-password
resetPassword.missingToken: Itoken yokuseta kwakhona iphasiwedi ayisebenzi okanye ayikho.
resetPassword.missingTokenHelper: Itoken ayisebenzi okanye ayikho. Nceda ucele ikhonkco elitsha lokuseta kwakhona iphasiwedi.
resetPassword.strongPasswordHint: Khetha i-password eyomeleleyo ongayisebenzisi kwenye indawo.

inkxaso.heading: Singanceda njani?
inkxaso.contactIntro: Siza kuzama ukusombulula le nto ngoko nangoko. Ukuba akunjalo, iqela lethu liza kulandelela umkhondo.
inkxaso.sendError: Akukwazanga ukuthunyelwa. Thumela i-imeyile ku-support@chatforia.com endaweni yoko.
inkxaso.actionFailed: Akukwazanga ukugqibezela eso senzo. Nceda uzame kwakhona.
inkxaso.ticketCreated: Asikwazanga ukusombulula oku ngokuzenzekelayo. Iqela lethu liza kulandelela.
inkxaso.escalationMessage: Asikwazanga ukusombulula oku ngokuzenzekelayo. Iqela lethu liza kulandelela.
inkxaso.genericError: Kukho into engahambanga kakuhle. Nceda uzame kwakhona.
inkxaso.resolvedInstantly: Ingxaki isonjululwe kwangoko — akukho tikiti lidingekiyo.

account.q: Ndiwudala njani okanye ndiwufumana njani kwakhona umbhaliso wam?
account.a: Khuphela i-app okanye usebenzise iwebhu, cofa u-"Dala i-akhawunti", qinisekisa i-imeyile/ifowuni yakho. Ukuze uyifumane kwakhona, sebenzisa u-"Ndilibele iphasiwedi".

privacy.q: Ingaba imiyalezo ikhuselwe ukusuka kuthi ga ekugqibeleni?
privacy.a: Ewe. Imiyalezo neefowuni zifihliwe ngokupheleleyo ngokwazo. Nguwe kuphela nomamkeli onokuzifunda.

uguqulelo.a: Vula "Uguqulelo oluzenzekelayo" kwi-Settings → Appearance & Language. Sigquma kwisixhobo apho ixhaswayo, kungenjalo sisebenzisa ii-API ezikhuselekileyo kunye nedatha encinci yomsebenzisi.

unxibelelwano.a: Qhagamshelana nathi ku-support@chatforia.com. Faka i-screenshots kunye nohlobo lwe-app yakho.

gettingStarted.title: Ukuqalisa
gettingStarted.subtitle: Utsha kwi-Chatforia? Oku kuqalisa okukhawulezayo kubonisa izinto ezisisiseko ukuze ukwazi ukusebenza ngemizuzu.

alert.text: Esi sikhokelo siza kukhula njengoko sisungula iimpawu ezintsha. Ukuba kukho into engekhoyo, sazise nge

section1.title: 1) Dala i-akhawunti yakho
section1.uqalisoLwethandabuzo: Kwi-app, vula i-Settings ukuseta iintandabuzo zakho

section2.title: 2) Qalisa ukuthumela imiyalezo
section2.item1: Yenza i-DM okanye iQela uze uthumele umyalezo wakho wokuqala.
section2.item2: Sebenzisa uguqulelo olukhawulezayo ukuze uncokole ngeelwimi ezingaphezu kwe-100.
section2.item3: Zama imiyalezo eyenyamalalayo kunye neirisithi zokufundwa kwi-Profile → Ubumfihlo.

section3.title: 3) Qhubela phambili
section3.item1: Ungakwazi ukuphuculela kwisicwangciso esihlawulelwayo nangaliphi na ixesha ngaphakathi kwe-app.
section3.item2: Nje ukuba ungene, ungadibanisa ezinye izixhobo kwaye usete iibhekups ezifihliweyo kwi-Settings kwi-app.
section3.item2Part1: Nje ukuba ungene, ungadibanisa ezinye izixhobo kwaye usete iibackups ezifihliweyo kwi-Settings kwi-app.

howItWorks.title: Indlela Esisebenza Ngayo iChatforia
howItWorks.intro: IChatforia yenzelwe ukwenza unxibelelwano lube lula, lukhawuleze, kwaye lufikeleleke lula. Ukuqalisa kuthatha amanyathelo ambalwa nje.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Bhalisa usebenzisa i-imeyile yakho okanye igama lomsebenzisi ukudala i-akhawunti yakho yeChatforia.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Qhagamshelana nabanye ngokukhetha abaqhagamshelani okanye uqalise iincoko ezintsha.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Imiyalezo ithunyelwa ngokukhawuleza ukunika amava onxibelelwano alula.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Inguqulelo efakwe ngaphakathi inceda abasebenzisi ukuba banxibelelane ngeelwimi ezahlukeneyo.
howItWorks.step5Desc: Lawula izinto ozikhethayo, abaqhagamshelwano, kunye nezicwangciso zonxibelelwano.

ukhuseleko.intro: I-Chatforia izinikele ekugcineni imeko ekhuselekileyo nenentlonipho kubo bonke abasebenzisi. Ezi zikhokelo zinceda ukuqinisekisa amava amnandi kumntu wonke.
ukhuseleko.respectDesc: Abasebenzisi kulindeleke ukuba banxibelelane ngentlonipho. Ukuxhatshazwa, ukuxhatshazwa kakubi, okanye indlela yokuziphatha eyingozi akukho kuvunyelwe.
ukhuseleko.enforcementDesc: Singathatha amanyathelo nxamnye nee-akhawunti ezaphula ezi zikhokelo, kuquka izilumkiso, izithintelo, okanye ukususwa okusisigxina kwiqonga.

whyMessaging.title: Kutheni Amaqonga OkuThumela Imiyalezo Ebaluleke Ngaphezu Kwakha Kwakha
whyMessaging.intro: Amaqonga okuthumela imiyalezo sele eyizixhobo ezibaluleke kakhulu zonxibelelwano kwihlabathi lanamhlanje. Ukususela kwiincoko zobuqu ukuya kunxibelelwano loshishino, ii-apps zokuthumela imiyalezo zivumela abantu ukuba bahlale benxibelelana ngoko nangoko nangempumelelo.
whyMessaging.everydayDesc: Abantu bathembele kwii-apps zokuthumela imiyalezo kunxibelelwano lwemihla ngemihla nabahlobo, usapho, kunye nabo basebenza nabo. Nokuba yingxelo ekhawulezayo okanye incoko ende, ukuthumela imiyalezo kubonelela ngendlela elula nengaguqukiyo yokuhlala unxibelelana.
whyMessaging.speedDesc: Enye yezona njongo zingundoqo zeqonga lokuthumela imiyalezo sisantya sazo. Imiyalezo ifika kwangoko, ivumela abasebenzisi ukuba banxibelelane ngexesha lokwenene. Olu nqanaba lokukhululeka lwenze ukuthumela imiyalezo yaba yeyona ndlela ithandwayo yonxibelelwano kubantu abaninzi.
whyMessaging.globalDesc: Iiqonga zokuthumela imiyalezo zidibanisa abantu kwihlabathi jikelele. Ngokufikelela kwi-intanethi, abasebenzisi banokunxibelelana kungakhathaliseki ukuba baphi, nto leyo eyenza kube lula ukwakha ubudlelwane nokusebenzisana namazwe ngamazwe.
whyMessaging.privacyDesc: Iiqonga zokuthumela imiyalezo zale mihla zigxile ekunikezeni abasebenzisi ulawulo kwidatha yabo nakwiincoko zabo. Iimpawu ezifana nokukhuselwa kwemfihlo (encryption), useto lobumfihlo, kunye nezilawuli zemiyalezo zivumela abasebenzisi ukuba banxibelelane ngokuzithemba.
whyMessaging.futureDesc: Ukuthumela imiyalezo kuyaqhubeka nokuvela ngeempawu ezintsha ezifana neempendulo ezixhaswa yi-AI, uguqulelo, kunye nokwabelana nge-multimedia. Njengoko itekhnoloji iqhubela phambili, amaqonga okuthumela imiyalezo aya kuba namandla ngakumbi kwaye abe neenjongo ezininzi.
whyMessaging.outro: I-Chatforia yakhiwe ngala migaqo engqondweni, inikezela ngamava okuthumela imiyalezo akhawulezayo, akhuselekileyo, namava okuthumela imiyalezo alula ukusetyenziswa kwihlabathi elidibanisiweyo.

global.title: Ikamva Lonxibelelwano Lwehlabathi
global.intro: Unxibelelwano lutshintshe ngokukhawuleza kule minyaka ingamashumi ambalwa idlulileyo. Into eyayifuna iifowuni okanye kwi -intlanganiso zabantu ezibuthathu ngoku zinokwenziwa ngokukhawuleza ngamaqonga onxibelelwano. Njengoko itekhnoloji iqhubeka nokuqhubela phambili, unxibelelwano lwehlabathi luya luyokhawuleza, lufikeleleke ngakumbi, kwaye lubandakanye wonke umntu.
global.izithinteloDesc: Olunye lwezona tshintsho zinkulu kunxibelelwano kukuncipha kwezithintelo zejografi. Abantu ngoku banokunxibelelana nabanye kwihlabathi jikelele ngexesha eliphantse libe lelo lokwenene. Nokuba yincoko yobuqu, ishishini, okanye intsebenziswano, amaqonga onxibelelwano enze umgama ungabi nantsingiselo kangako .
global.translationDesc: Ulwimi ngokwembali ibisoloko lulunye lwezona miqobo inkulu kunxibelelwano lwehlabathi jikelele. Namhlanje, izixhobo zoguqulelo ezakhelweyo zinceda ekutywineni elo gxalaba. Amaqonga afana neChatforia avumela abasebenzisi ukuba banxibelelane ngokulula nangona bethetha iilwimi ezahlukeneyo, edala amathuba amatsha okunxibelelana nokuqondana.
global.realtimeDesc: Isantya sisihloko esiphambili esibumba unxibelelwano lwanamhlanje. Abasebenzisi balindele ukuba imiyalezo ihanjiswe ngokukhawuleza, kwaye iziseko zophuhliso zanamhlanje ziyayixhasa loo nto. Ukuhanjiswa kwemiyalezo ngexesha lokwenyani kwenza ukuba iincoko zibe zendalo kwaye zihambe kakuhle.
global.privacyDesc: Njengoko unxibelelwano luya lwenza lwedijithali, ubumfihlo nokhuseleko ziya zibaluleka ngakumbi. Abasebenzisi bafuna ukuqiniseka ukuba iincoko zabo zikhuselwe. Iimpawu ezifana nokufihla iinkcukacha (encryption) kunye nezicwangciso ezilawulwa ngumsebenzisi zinceda ekuxhaseni amava onxibelelwano akhuselekileyo ngakumbi.
global.futureDesc: Ikamva lonxibelelwano lwehlabathi jikelele liza kuba nezixhobo eziphucukileyo, ezifana nemiyalezo encediswa yi-AI, uguqulelo oluphuculweyo, kunye namava angcono abasebenzisi. Njengoko itekhnoloji iqhubela phambili, unxibelelwano luza kuqhubeka lwenza lula kwaye lufikeleleke ngakumbi.
global.outro: Iiqonga ezifana neChatforia ziyinxalenye yolu tshintsho, zinceda abantu badibane ngokulula ngaphaya kweelwimi nemida.

index.title: IBlogi yeChatforia
index.intro: Phonononga iimbono ngonxibelelwano, ukhuseleko kwi-intanethi, nendlela itekhnoloji yemiyalezo edibanisa abantu kwihlabathi jikelele ngayo.

chatSafely.title: Indlela yokuCatshatha ngokukhuselekileyo kwi-Intanethi
chatSafely.intro: Unxibelelwano lwe-intanethi lwenze kwaba lula ngaphezu kwangaphambili ukunxibelelana nabantu kwihlabathi jikelele. Nokuba uthumela imiyalezo kubahlobo, udibana nabantu abatsha, okanye usebenzisana nabantu ngokomsebenzi, amaqonga onyuselo-miyalezo adlala indima enkulu kubomi bemihla ngemihla. Nangona kunjalo, ukukhuseleka kwi-intanethi kubaluleke ngokufanayo nokuhlala unxibelelene.

personalInfo.title: Khusela Iinkcukacha Zakho Zobuqu
personalInfo.body: Omnye wemigaqo ebaluleke kakhulu yokhuseleko kwi-intanethi kukuphepha ukwabelana ngeenkcukacha zobuqu ezibuthathaka. Oku kubandakanya idilesi yakho yasekhaya, iinkcukacha zemali, iiphaswedi, okanye nayiphi na inkcukacha ekunokuthi ngayo waziwe enokuthi isetyenziswe gwenxa. Nokuba yincoko nje eqhelekileyo, kungcono uqaphele into oyabelanayo nokuba wabelana nabani na ngayo.

safetyFeatures.title: Sebenzisa Iimpawu Zokhuseleko Ezakhelwe Ngaphakathi
safetyFeatures.body: Amaqonga onxibelelwano anamhlanje afana neChatforia anika izixhobo zokunceda abasebenzisi bahlale bekhuselekile. Iimpawu ezifana nokuthintela, ukuxela, kunye nezilawuli zobumfihlo zenzelwe ukunika abasebenzisi ulawulo kumava abo. Ukuba umntu uthatha indlela engafanelekanga okanye ukwenza ungazive kakuhle, kufuneka usebenzise ezi zixhobo kwangoko.

iinkohliso.umzimba: Abakhohlisi bahlala besebenzisa amaqonga onomyalezo ukukhohlisa abasebenzisi ukuba babelane ngeenkcukacha zabo zobuqu okanye bathumele imali. Lumka imiyalezo ebonakala ingokwenene kakhulu, enjengezibonelelo ezingalindelekanga, izicelo ezingxamisekileyo, okanye amakhonkco angaziwayo. Soloko uqinisekisa isazisi somntu othetha naye phambi kokuba uthathe nawaphi na amanyathelo.

ukuthathela-nyanzeliso.umzimba: Unxibelelwano oluhloniphekeyo lunceda ukudala imeko ekhuselekileyo kuye wonke umntu. Kuphephe ukuthatha inxaxheba kwiincoko eziyingozi okanye ezihlambanyayo, kwaye uqaphele indlela amazwi akho anokuchaphazela ngayo abanye. Unxibelelwano oluhle lwenza amava angcono kuwo onke amasebenzisi.

kutheniUkhuseleko.umzimba: Njengoko unxibelelwano lwedijithali luqhubeka lukhula, ukugcina ukhuseleko nokuthembana kuya kusiba kubaluleke kakhulu. Ngokulandela iindlela ezisisiseko zokhuseleko nokusebenzisa izixhobo ezikhoyo, abasebenzisi banakonwabela iingenelo zokuthumela imiyalezo ngelixa banciphisa iingozi.

chatSafely.sishwankathelo: Ukuhlala ukhuselekile kwi-intanethi akufuni kulwazi oluphucukileyo lobuchwepheshe—kufuneka ukuba ube selumkiso, ube nonophelo, kwaye wenze izigqibo ezifanelekileyo. Ngokuba nemikhwa efanelekileyo, unokunxibelelana ngokuzithemba nangokukhuselekileyo.

ngokuphathelele.inkcazelo: IChatforia yinkonzo yezabelo ekhuselekileyo, enezilwimi ezininzi, enokufihla iincoko ukusuka ekuqaleni ukuya ekugqibeleni, ukuhumusha okukhawulezileyo, kunye nokufowuna ngelizwi/ividiyo. Injongo yethu ilula: ukunceda abantu banxibelelane—ngokukhuselekileyo, ngasese, nangaphakathi kweelwimi ezahlukeneyo.

values.privacy: Ubumfihlo kuza kuqala: Ukuvalwa kwezinto ukusuka ekuqaleni ukuya esiphelweni (E2E) ngokomlinganiselo.
values.access: Ufikelelo kubo bonke: Ukuguqulela ngokuzenzekelayo iilwimi ezingaphezu kwe-100.
values.control: Ulawulo: Imiyalezo ephunyayo kunye neengxelo zokufundwa azinyanzelekanga.
values.privacy_ aria: Ubumfihlo kuza kuqala: Uku-encrypt kwe-E2E ngokungagqibekanga.

ngokuphathelele.howDescription: Imiyalezo iyakhiqwa kwisixhobo sakho phambi kokuba iphume kuso. Uguqulelo, iibackups, kunye nokulungelelaniswa kwesixhobo ziyilelwe ukunciphisa into ebonwa ziiseva zethu.

press.title: Press
press.boilerplateBody: IChatforia yi-app yemiyalezo ebeka phambili ubumfihlo eyenza incoko yezilwimi ezahlukeneyo ibe lula. Imiyalezo ifihliwe ngokupheleleyo ngokwendalo, kwaye uguqulelo olwakhelweyo luxhasa izilwimi ezingaphezu kwe-100 ngexesha lokwenyani. Abasebenzisi banokwenza imiyalezo inyamalale, bagcine iziqinisekiso zokufundwa zinganyanzelwanga, kwaye bahlanganise izixhobo zabo. Ifumaneka kwi-iOS, i-Android, nakwi-webhu.
press.assetsSubtitle: Iilogo, iifoto zescreen, kunye nemifanekiso yemveliso.
press.scanTip: Kwikhompyutha? Skena nge-fowuni yakho ukuze ufumane i-app.

careers.title: Imisebenzi
careers.intro: Siliqela elincinci elingabasunguli elakha iChatforia — umyalezelwano wabucala wehlabathi jikelele oza kupapashwa kwi-webhu, i-iOS, nakwi-Android. Ukuba uyakhathalela ubumfihlo, ukufihliweyo, kunye namava amnandi omsebenzisi, singathanda ukuva kuwe.
careers.openRoles: Izikhala ezivulekileyo zokusungula: Umphathi we-Full-stack Engineer, i-Backend Engineer (Node.js), i-Frontend/ Umnjineli weWebhu (React), Umnjineli weSelula (iOS), Umnjineli weSelula (Android), Umnjineli weDevOps/SRE, Umnjineli woKhuseleko noFihlo-lwamazwi, Umnjineli wezoNxibelelwano (Twilio + eSIM).
careers.apply: Indlela yokufaka isicelo: Sebenzisa iqhosha elingezantsi ukuthumela nge-imeyile i-resume yakho kunye namakhonkco.
careers.whyBullets: • Nceda ekwakheni isiseko somthumeli omtsha wehlabathi jikelele.• Khupha uphuculo olusetyenziswa kwi-web, i-iOS, kunye ne-Android.• Sebenza ngokuthe ngqo nomsunguli kulwakhiwo lwecandelo kunye nokwalathiswa kwemveliso.• Lawula iindawo ezinegalelo eliphezulu kwi-stack: imiyalezo, ilizwi, ividiyo, ukufihla iinkcukacha, unxibelelwano, i-AI.• Zibandakanye ekuqaleni — phambi kokuba isiseko sabasebenzisi sikhule.

advertise.title: Thengisa nge-Chatforia
advertise.description: Fikelela kubasebenzisi bemiyalezo abanomdla ngeendawo ezintle nezikhuselekileyo kwibrendi. Sinikezela ngezibhengezo zebhana kwiindawo ezibonakala kakhulu, inkxaso-mali, kunye neephromoshini zethu. Ababhalisi be-premium abaziboni izibhengezo.

adsense.withPubIdShort: Sikwabonelela ngezibhengezo ngeGoogle AdSense. Ungajolisa kwi-Chatforia nge-ID yompapashi {{pub Id}}, okanye usebenzise le fomu ingezantsi ukuze ufumane inkxaso-mali ethe ngqo.
adsense.noPubIdShort: Sikwabonelela ngezinye iindawo zentengiso ngeGoogle AdSense. Inkxaso-mali ethe ngqo iyafumaneka—sebenzisa le fomu ingezantsi.

advertise.noPlacementsPublic: Sisagqibezela uluhlu lwethu lwezibhengezo. Sixelele ngephulo lakho kwaye siza kucetyisa iindawo zokubeka.

intro.body: Lo Mgaqo-nkqubo Wokukhuseleka Kweenkcukacha uchaza indlela iChatforia ("thina", "thuselana") siqokelela, sisebenzise, kwaye sabelane ngolwazi xa usebenzisa ii-apps neenkonzo zethu. Sakha i-Chatforia ukunciphisa idatha esinokuyifikelela.

infoWeCollect.title: Ulwazi esiluqokelelayo
infoWeCollect.iakhawunti: Iinkcukacha zeakhawunti (umz., i-imeyile/ifowuni) ukwenza nokukhusela iakhawunti yakho.
infoWeCollect.ekhripthiweyo: Umxholo okhripthiweyo (iimiyalezo/iifowuni) ukhripthiwe ukusuka ekuqaleni ukuya ekugqibeleni; asikwazi ukuyifunda.
infoWeCollect.i-diagnostics: I-diagnostic/ukusetyenziswa okufana neelog zokuwa, uhlobo lwesixhobo, okanye uhlalutyo olukrwada ukuphucula ukusebenza.

sms.title: Iinombolo zefowuni ephathwayo kunye ne-SMS
sms.body: Ukuba ukhetha ukunika inombolo yefowuni ephathwayo, siyisebenzisa ukuvumela iimpawu ezifana nokuqinisekisa i-akhawunti, izaziso zokungena, kunye nokuthumela imiyalezo phakathi kwabasebenzisi nge-SMS apho ixhaswayo. Sinokuthumela imiyalezo ye-SMS enxulumene nentengiselwano ehambelana ne-akhawunti yakho kunye nemisebenzi yakho kwi-Chatforia. Ungakhetha ukungaphumi kwakho ekwamkeleni imiyalezo ye-SMS nanini na xesha ngokuphendula ngegama elingundoqo lokuphuma (njenge "STOP") okanye ngokutshintsha iindlela ozikhethayo zezaziso kwi-app. Asiyithengisi inombolo yakho yefowuni okanye siyisebenzisele ukuthengisa okungahambelaniyo.

howWeUse.title: Indlela esisebenzisa ngayo ulwazi
howWeUse.provide: Ubonelela kwaye ukhusele inkonzo (ukuqinisekisa ubunyani, ukufumana i-spam/ukusetyenziswa gwenxa).

sharing.title: Ukwabelana
sharing.body: Asithengisi iinkcukacha zobuqu. Sinokwabelana ngeenkcukacha ezilinganiselweyo nabaqhubi (umz., izaziso ze-push, i-analytics) phantsi kwezivumelwano eziqinileyo.

amalungelo.title: Amalungelo akho
amalungelo.body: Kuxhomekeke kummandla wakho (umz., GDPR/UK GDPR/CPRA), ungacela ukufikelela, ukulungiswa, ukucinywa, okanye ukuphuma kuhlobo oluthile lokulungiswa. Qhagamshelana: privacy@chatforia.com.

ugcino.title: Ukugcinwa kwedatha nokhuseleko
ugcino.body: Sigcina kuphela oko kufunekayo ukuze sisebenzise inkonzo kwaye sisebenzise ukhuseleko olukumgangatho weshishini. Umxholo we-E2E awunakudlondlobala sibe yidatha efundekayo ngathi.

abantwana.title: Abantwana
abantwana.body: I-Chatforia ayijoliswanga kubantwana abangaphantsi kweminyaka eyi-13 (okanye njengoko kufunwa ngumthetho walapha ekuhlaleni).

acceptableUse.title: Ukusetyenziswa okwamkelekileyo
acceptableUse.itemNoAbuse: Akukho mxholo ongekho mthethweni, onyanyisayo, okanye otyhoboza amalungelo; akukho spam okanye ukusetyenziswa gwenxa okuzenzekelayo.

sms.title: Unxibelelwano lwe-SMS
sms.body: Ukuba unika inombolo yefowuni ephathwayo, uyavuma ukuba iChatforia ingakuthumelela imiyalezo ye-SMS enxulumene ne-akhawunti yakho kunye nokusetyenziswa kwenkonzo, enjengezilumkiso zokungena, izaziso zokhuseleko, kunye nemiyalezo enxulumene neencoko ozisungulayo okanye othatha inxaxheba kuzo. Asisebenzisi i-SMS kwimiyalezo yokuthengisa okanye yentengiso ngaphandle kwemvume yakho ecacileyo. Iirhafu zemiyalezo yesiqhelo kunye nedatha zinokusebenza. Ungakhetha ukungathathi nxaxheba yemiyalezo ye-SMS nangaliphi na ixesha ngokuphendula ngegama elingundoqo lokuphuma (umzekelo, "STOP") okanye ngokuhlaziya izicwangciso zakho zezaziso kwi-app.

yourContent.title: Umxholo wakho
yourContent.body: Ugcina amalungelo kumxholo wakho. Usinika amalungelo ayimfuneko okusebenzisa le nkonzo (umz., ukuhambisa, ukugcina, ukuguqulela).

disclaimer.title: Izikhanyeli noxanduva
disclaimer.body: Inkonzo inikezelwa "njengoko injalo" ngaphandle kweziqinisekiso. Kwinqanaba elipheleleyo elivumelekileyo ngokomthetho, iChatforia ayinaxanduva lezomonakalo ongathanga ngqo okanye ovelayo.

changes.title: Utshintsho
changes.body: Singazihlaziya ezi miqathango; ukuqhubeka nokusebenzisa emva kweenguqu kuthetha ukwamkelwa.

contact.title: Qhagamshelana
contact.body: support@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 123 Example St, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA

refund.title: Umgaqo-nkqubo Wembuyekezo
refund.intro: E-Chatforia, sizama ukubonelela ngenkonzo ekumgangatho ophezulu kubo bonke abasebenzisi. Lo Mgaqo-nkqubo Wembuyekezo uchaza ukuba iimbuyekezo zinokukhutshelwa nini.

iintlawulo-zokubhalisa.umzimba: Iintlawulo-zokubhalisa zihlawulwa kwangaphambili ngokuphindaphindiweyo. Ungarhoxisa nangaliphi na ixesha usebenzisa izicwangciso zeakhawunti yakho okanye iqonga olisebenzisileyo ukuthenga.

ukufaneleka.umzimba: Iimbuyekezo zinokunikezelwa ngenxa yeentlawulo eziphindwe kabini, iimpazamo zokuhlawulisa, okanye iingxaki zobuchwepheshe ezithintela ukufikelela kwiimpawu ezihlawulelwayo. Zonke izicelo ziyajongwa nganye nganye.

okungabuyiswayo.umzimba: Ngokubanzi asinikezeli ngeembuyekezo ngexesha elingasetyenziswanga, amaxesha enxalenye yobhaliso, okanye ukusilela ukurhoxisa phambi kokuhlaziywa."

thirdParty.body: Ukuba zithengiwe kumaqonga amaqela esithathu afana ne-Apple App Store, izibuyiselo-mali kufuneka zicelwe ngqo kulawo maqonga.

doNotSell.body: I-Chatforia ayithengisi iinkcukacha zobuqu. Abahlali baseCalifornia basenokufaka izicelo phantsi kwe-CPRA besebenzisa iqhosha elingezantsi.

cookies.title: Iisetingi zeeCookie
cookies.body: I-Chatforia isebenzisa ii-cookies ezimbalwa (umz., yeseshini, yokhuseleko). Asisebenzisi ii-cookies zezibhengezo zomntu wesithathu. Lawula ii-cookies ngeesetingi zebrawuza yakho.

whatWeSend.title: Into esiyithumelayo
whatWeSend.body: I-Chatforia ithumela kuphela ii-SMS ezinxulumene ne-akhawunti kunye neencoko kumanani efowuni umsebenzisi awanikezele ngawo ngokucacileyo waza wavuma. Imiyalezo eqhelekileyo iquka iikhowudi zokungena/zokuqinisekisa, izaziso zokuhanjiswa kwemiyalezo, izaziso zokhuseleko, kunye nohlaziyo lwe-akhawunti lwentengiselwano.
